name: RoMM
description: Retro game library and emulator — browse, organize, and play retro games in the browser
author: Crow

env_vars.name: ROMM_LIBRARY_PATH
env_vars.description: Host path containing your ROM files (organized by system)

env_vars.name: ROMM_AUTH_SECRET_KEY
env_vars.description: Session secret key for RoMM authentication

env_vars.name: IGDB_CLIENT_ID
env_vars.description: IGDB API client ID for game metadata enrichment (optional)

env_vars.name: IGDB_CLIENT_SECRET
env_vars.description: IGDB API client secret for game metadata enrichment (optional)

notes: Organize ROM files into system subdirectories (e.g., roms/gba/, roms/snes/, roms/n64/). IGDB credentials enable automatic cover art and metadata. Get them free at https://api-docs.igdb.com/
